sentences.english: If I have a cold, I do absolutely nothing.
sentences.korean: 감기에 걸리면 저는 아무것도 안 해요.

sentences.english: My theory is that cold remedies and antibiotics don't help because your body is immune to them.
sentences.korean: 제 이론은 감기약과 항생제가 도움이 안 된다는 거예요. 몸이 그것들에 면역이 되었기 때문이죠.

sentences.english: You may as well just let your body heal itself.
sentences.korean: 차라리 그냥 몸이 스스로 치유하게 하는 게 나아요.

sentences.english: What do I do for a cold?
Well, I drink lots of fluids.

quiz.question: What does '감기 치료법' mean in English?

sentences.english: I like to eat soups, so get as much clear soup down me as possible.
sentences.korean: 수프 먹는 걸 좋아해서, 가능한 한 많은 맑은 수프를 마셔요.

sentences.english: I take cayenne pepper, red pepper powder and I put it in everything I'm eating.
sentences.korean: 카이엔 고추, 빨간 고춧가루를 먹는 모든 것에 넣어요.

sentences.english: When I've got a cold, I will stay at home and my grandmother always gives me a special herb tea.
sentences.korean: 감기에 걸리면 집에 있고, 할머니가 항상 특별한 허브 차를 주세요.

sentences.english: Now I live by myself so I just make myself herb tea and massage my fingers and my hands.
sentences.korean: 지금은 혼자 사니까 그냥 허브 차를 만들고 손가락과 손을 마사지해요.

sentences.english: I think the only thing you can do with a cold is to wait it out.
sentences.korean: 감기에 할 수 있는 유일한 건 기다리는 것뿐이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: I will go to bed for the weekend, drink lots of hot drinks and eat oranges for vitamin C.
sentences.korean: 주말 동안 침대에 누워 있고, 뜨거운 음료를 많이 마시고 비타민 C를 위해 오렌지를 먹어요.

quiz.question: What does '감기 치료법' mean in English?
